name: no ip address
detail: Remove the IPv4 address.

name: no shutdown
detail: Enable the interface.

name: shutdown
detail: Administratively disable the interface.

name: description
detail: Interface description text.

name: neighbor
detail: Configure a BGP neighbor.

name: authentication event
detail: 802.1X/MAB authentication event action.

name: authentication order
detail: Set the 802.1X/MAB authentication method order.

name: authentication open
detail: Enable open (monitor) mode for 802.1X/MAB.

name: authentication timer
detail: 802.1X/MAB reauthentication/restart timer.

name: transport input ssh
detail: Allow SSH only on this line.

name: transport input
detail: Set the allowed transport protocols for this line.
syntax: transport input { ssh | telnet | none | all }

name: service timestamps
detail: Add timestamps to debug/log messages.

name: mtu
detail: Set the interface MTU.

name: ip helper-address
detail: Forward broadcast UDP packets (e.g. DHCP) to this address.

name: spanning-tree portfast
detail: Enable PortFast on this port (legacy form; see also "spanning-tree portfast edge ...").

name: mab
detail: Enable MAC Authentication Bypass.

name: tunnel mode
detail: Set the tunnel encapsulation mode.

name: address-family
detail: Enter address-family configuration mode.

name: bgp router-id
detail: Set the BGP router ID.

name: route-target
detail: Configure a VRF/EVPN route-target.

name: vni
detail: Map a VXLAN Network Identifier.

name: advertise-pip
detail: Advertise PIP (primary IP) in EVPN.

name: bandwidth
detail: Set bandwidth for a policy-map class.

name: police
detail: Police traffic to a bit rate in a policy-map class.

name: login local
detail: Authenticate against the local user database.

name: login authentication
detail: Use a named AAA login method list for this line.

name: exec-timeout
detail: Set the EXEC session idle timeout for this line.

name: access-class
detail: Restrict line access with an access list.

name: ip route
detail: Configure a static IPv4 route.

name: parameter-map type
detail: Define a parameter map.

name: template
detail: Define a configuration template.

name: l2vpn evpn
detail: Enter L2VPN EVPN configuration.

name: line vty
detail: Configure a range of VTY lines.

name: line console
detail: Configure the console line.

name: logging
detail: Configure system message logging.

name: logging host
detail: Send log messages to a syslog host.

name: logging trap
detail: Set the severity level for messages sent to syslog hosts.

name: logging facility
detail: Set the syslog facility for outgoing messages.

name: ntp server
detail: Configure an NTP time source.

name: ip ssh version 2
detail: Force SSH version 2.

name: ip domain-name
detail: Set the device domain name.

name: ip domain name
detail: Set the device domain name (alternate syntax).

name: aaa authentication login
detail: Define an AAA login authentication method list.

name: crypto isakmp policy
detail: Define an IKE policy.

name: crypto ipsec transform-set
detail: Define an IPsec transform set.

name: crypto map
detail: Define a crypto map entry.

name: zone security
detail: Define a security zone.

name: zone-pair security
detail: Define a zone-pair for the zone-based firewall.
syntax: zone-pair security name source z destination z

name: dot1x
detail: Configure the 802.1X Port Access Entity role.

name: switchport
detail: Layer-2 port configuration (summary).

name: spanning-tree
detail: Spanning Tree Protocol configuration (summary).

name: router
detail: Enter a routing-protocol process (summary).
syntax: router { bgp asn | ospf pid | eigrp as }

name: tacacs
detail: TACACS+ server configuration (summary; see "tacacs server").

name: authentication
detail: 802.1X/MAB port-based authentication configuration (summary).
syntax: authentication { order | priority | event | host-mode | open | timer } ...

name: switchport mode trunk
detail: Set port to trunk mode.

name: switchport trunk allowed vlan
detail: Restrict the VLANs allowed on a trunk.

name: switchport trunk native vlan
detail: Set the trunk native VLAN.

name: spanning-tree bpduguard enable
detail: Enable BPDU Guard on this port.

name: dot1x pae authenticator
detail: Set 802.1X PAE role to authenticator.

name: service-policy input
detail: Attach a policy map to ingress traffic.

name: service-policy output
detail: Attach a policy map to egress traffic.

name: address-family l2vpn evpn
detail: Enter the L2VPN EVPN address family.

name: match access-group
detail: Match traffic against an access list in a class-map.

name: match dscp
detail: Match traffic by DSCP value in a class-map.

name: match protocol
detail: Match traffic by protocol (NBAR) in a class-map.

name: class-map match-any
detail: Create a class-map matching any criterion.

name: class-map match-all
detail: Create a class-map matching all criteria.

name: ip access-list standard
detail: Define a named standard IP access list.

name: ip access-list extended
detail: Define a named extended IP access list.

name: call-home
detail: Enter Call Home configuration mode (Smart Call Home / smart licensing telemetry).

name: control-plane
detail: Enter control-plane configuration mode (attach control-plane policing policies).

name: memory free low-watermark processor
detail: Warn when free processor memory drops below the threshold.

name: netconf-yang
detail: Enable the NETCONF-YANG programmatic interface.

name: telemetry ietf subscription
detail: Define a model-driven telemetry subscription.

name: telemetry receiver protocol
detail: Define a named protocol telemetry receiver.

name: telemetry transform
detail: Define a telemetry transform over operational data tables.

name: transceiver type all
detail: Enter transceiver type configuration mode (digital optical monitoring).

name: aaa server radius dynamic-author
detail: Accept RADIUS Change-of-Authorization (CoA) requests as a dynamic authorization server.

name: aaa session-id
detail: Use a common or unique session ID across all AAA session phases.

name: vrf definition
detail: Define a VRF instance (enter VRF configuration mode).

name: crypto pki trustpoint
detail: Declare a PKI trustpoint (enter ca-trustpoint configuration mode).

name: crypto pki certificate chain
detail: Enter the certificate chain for a trustpoint.

name: crypto engine compliance shield
detail: Control the crypto engine compliance shield.

name: diagnostic bootup level
detail: Set the Generic Online Diagnostics (GOLD) bootup test level.

name: clock timezone
detail: Set the system time zone.

name: clock summer-time
detail: Configure daylight saving time.
syntax: clock summer-time zone recurring [week day month hh:mm week day month hh:mm]

name: ip name-server
detail: Configure DNS name servers.

name: ip dhcp relay
detail: Global DHCP relay agent behavior.
syntax: ip dhcp relay { bootp ignore | information ... }

name: login on-failure
detail: Log failed login attempts.

name: login on-success
detail: Log successful login attempts.

name: mpls label mode
detail: Set the MPLS label allocation mode.
syntax: mpls label mode { all-vrfs | vrf name } protocol all-afs per-vrf

name: ip forward-protocol
detail: Specify which broadcast UDP protocols are forwarded by helper addresses.

name: ip http server
detail: Enable the HTTP server.

name: ip http secure-server
detail: Enable the HTTPS server.

name: ip http authentication
detail: Set the HTTP server authentication method.
syntax: ip http authentication { local | aaa | enable }

name: ip http client source-interface
detail: Source interface for HTTP client connections.

name: ip pim register-source
detail: Source interface for PIM register messages.

name: ip msdp peer
detail: Configure an MSDP peer.
syntax: ip msdp peer address connect-source interface

name: ip msdp originator-id
detail: Set the MSDP originator ID interface.

name: ip tftp source-interface
detail: Source interface for TFTP transfers.

name: ip ssh time-out
detail: SSH negotiation timeout.

name: ip ssh source-interface
detail: Source interface for outgoing SSH.

name: ip ssh bulk-mode
detail: Enable SSH bulk data transfer mode.

name: ip scp server enable
detail: Enable the SCP server.

name: snmp-server trap-source
detail: Source interface for SNMP traps.

name: snmp-server source-interface
detail: Source interface for SNMP traps/informs.

name: snmp-server location
detail: Set the SNMP sysLocation string.

name: snmp-server contact
detail: Set the SNMP sysContact string.

name: radius-server attribute
detail: Control how RADIUS attributes are sent/interpreted.

name: ntp broadcastdelay
detail: Estimated round-trip delay for NTP broadcasts.

name: ntp source
detail: Source interface for NTP packets.

name: ntp access-group
detail: Restrict NTP access with an ACL.
syntax: ntp access-group { peer | serve | serve-only | query-only } acl

name: line con
detail: Configure the console line.

name: line aux
detail: Configure the auxiliary line.

name: vrf forwarding
detail: Attach the interface to a VRF.

name: ip router isis
detail: Enable IS-IS IPv4 routing on the interface.

name: isis network point-to-point
detail: Run IS-IS in point-to-point mode on a LAN interface.

name: clns mtu
detail: Set the CLNS MTU (IS-IS PDU size).

name: ip redirects
detail: Send ICMP redirects (disable with "no ip redirects").

name: ip proxy-arp
detail: Answer ARP for other hosts (disable with "no ip proxy-arp").

name: negotiation
detail: Auto-negotiate speed/duplex/flow control.

name: dampening
detail: Dampen interface flaps before reporting state changes.

name: load-interval
detail: Interval for interface load/throughput statistics.

name: cts manual
detail: Enter Cisco TrustSec manual mode on the interface.

name: ip route-cache
detail: Control fast-switching cache behavior.

name: net
detail: Set the IS-IS Network Entity Title.

name: is-type
detail: Restrict the IS-IS level.

name: metric-style wide
detail: Use wide (new-style) IS-IS metrics.

name: log-adjacency-changes
detail: Log routing adjacency up/down events.

name: domain-password
detail: Set the IS-IS domain authentication password.

name: bgp log-neighbor-changes
detail: Log BGP neighbor state changes.

name: bgp redistribute-internal
detail: Allow iBGP routes to be redistributed into an IGP.

name: bgp aggregate-timer
detail: Interval for BGP aggregate route processing.

name: exit-address-family
detail: Leave address-family configuration mode.

name: locator-table
detail: Select the locator table (RLOC VRF) for this LISP router.

name: locator-set
detail: Define a named set of routing locators.

name: domain-id
detail: Set the LISP domain ID.

name: multihoming-id
detail: Set the LISP multihoming ID.

name: eid-table
detail: Bind an EID VRF to a LISP instance.
syntax: eid-table { default | vrf name } instance-id id

name: site
detail: Define a LISP map-server site.

name: service ipv4
detail: Enter LISP IPv4 service configuration.

name: service ethernet
detail: Enter LISP Ethernet (L2) service configuration.

name: map-server
detail: Enable/point to the LISP map-server.

name: map-resolver
detail: Enable/point to the LISP map-resolver.

name: proxy-etr
detail: Act as a LISP proxy egress tunnel router (PETR).

name: proxy-itr
detail: Act as a LISP proxy ingress tunnel router (PITR).

name: auto-discover-rlocs
detail: Auto-discover RLOCs of other site routers.

name: remote-rloc-probe
detail: Probe remote RLOCs (e.g. on route change).

name: import
detail: Import mappings (publications, prefix-lists, database entries).

name: route-export
detail: Export LISP mappings into the RIB.

name: eid-record
detail: Register an EID prefix for a map-server site.

name: authentication-key
detail: Site registration authentication key.

name: allow-locator-default-etr
detail: Accept default-ETR locators for an instance.

name: ipv4 locator reachability
detail: IPv4 locator reachability algorithm.

name: ipv4 source-locator
detail: Source interface for IPv4 LISP control messages.

name: IPv4-interface
detail: Bind an interface/priority/weight into a locator-set.
syntax: IPv4-interface interface priority p weight w

name: instance-id
detail: Enter per-instance configuration inside a LISP service.

name: exit-router-lisp
detail: Leave router lisp configuration mode.

name: exit-locator-set
detail: Leave locator-set configuration mode.

name: exit-service-ipv4
detail: Leave LISP IPv4 service configuration mode.

name: exit-service-ethernet
detail: Leave LISP Ethernet service configuration mode.

name: exit-instance-id
detail: Leave LISP instance configuration mode.

name: exit-site
detail: Leave LISP site configuration mode.

name: exit-prefix-list
detail: Leave LISP prefix-list configuration mode.

name: rd
detail: Set the VRF route distinguisher.

name: address-family ipv4
detail: Enter the IPv4 address family.

name: address-family ipv6
detail: Enter the IPv6 address family.

name: privilege level
detail: Default privilege level for this line.

name: stopbits
detail: Async line stop bits.

name: authorization exec
detail: Use a named AAA authorization list for EXEC on this line.

name: length
detail: Terminal screen length (0 disables paging).

name: history size
detail: Command history buffer size for this line.

name: server name
detail: Reference a named server in this AAA server group.

name: ip tacacs source-interface
detail: Source interface for TACACS+ packets from this group.

name: ip radius source-interface
detail: Source interface for RADIUS packets from this group.

name: client
detail: Authorize a CoA client by address and key.

name: automate-tester
detail: Probe the RADIUS server with a test user.

name: pac key
detail: PAC provisioning key for RADSEC/TrustSec.

name: enrollment
detail: How certificates are enrolled for this trustpoint.
syntax: enrollment { terminal | selfsigned | url url | mode ra | pkcs12 }

name: revocation-check
detail: Certificate revocation checking method.

name: rsakeypair
detail: RSA key pair used by this trustpoint.

name: fqdn
detail: FQDN placed in certificate requests.

name: subject-name
detail: Subject DN placed in certificate requests.

name: subject-alt-name
detail: Subject alternative name for certificate requests.

name: auto-enroll
detail: Re-enroll automatically at a lifetime percentage.

name: hash
detail: Hash algorithm for self-signed certificates/requests.

name: usage
detail: Intended key usage for this trustpoint.

name: certificate
detail: Enter a certificate by hex dump (terminated by "quit").
syntax: certificate { ca serial | self-signed serial | serial }

name: contact-email-addr
detail: Contact e-mail address for Call Home messages.

name: profile
detail: Define/enter a Call Home destination profile.

name: active
detail: Activate this Call Home profile.

name: encoding
detail: Telemetry payload encoding.

name: receiver-type
detail: How receivers are specified for this subscription.

name: source-address
detail: Source address for telemetry updates.

name: stream
detail: Telemetry stream type.

name: update-policy
detail: Push cadence: periodic interval or on-change.

name: receiver name
detail: Attach a named receiver to this subscription.

name: filter
detail: Filter selecting the data of interest.
syntax: filter { xpath path | tdl-uri uri | nested-uri uri }

name: host ip-address
detail: Receiver host address and port.

name: input table
detail: Operational data table feeding this transform.

name: field
detail: Select a field from the input table.

name: join-key
detail: Key joining multiple input tables.

name: logical-op
detail: Logical operator combining field specifications.

name: uri
detail: Output URI of the transformed data.

name: operation
detail: Enter a transform operation.

name: output-field
detail: Define an output field of the transform.

name: output-op
detail: Operation applied to an output field.

name: specified
detail: Mark the operation specification complete.

name: monitoring
detail: Enable digital optical monitoring.
